message:
refactor(config): deduplicate startup layer loading; fix resolve_paths_without_env_jsonl DB override

load_startup_config and load_startup_config_with_paths shared identical
four-layer load sequences; extract into load_startup_layers_for_paths
and resolve_startup_db_override helpers to eliminate repetition.
resolve_paths_without_env_jsonl previously passed None as the db_override
to ConfigPaths::resolve, ignoring project and user config db settings;
it now runs the full startup-layer resolution so the JSONL path is
consistent with the active DB location.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
